headline: 1 Reason to Buy Rivian Like There's No Tomorrow. Hint: It's Not the R2
summary: Investors waited patiently for the R2 launch, and it should pay off handsomely. But there's another massive reason to like Rivian long-term.

headline: Uber’s Blacklane Deal Puts Focus On Premium Growth And Valuation Gap
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has agreed to acquire global chauffeur service Blacklane, which operates in more than 500 cities worldwide. The deal brings Uber into the premium, pre booked executive travel segment and broadens its reach among corporate and luxury customers. The acquisition is intended to diversify Uber's revenue beyond its core ride hailing business and expand its premium mobility offering. Uber Technologies, trading at $71.84, is moving further into higher end transport...

headline: Here's Why Joby Aviation Stock Slumped in March
summary: The market sold on the news in March, and there was also negative newsflow about its plans in Dubai amid the regional conflict.

headline: Ross Gerber Backs Rivian Over Tesla Because Of Permanent Brand Damage And This Reason: 'Even If FSD Was Perfect...'
summary: Ross Gerber backs Rivian over Tesla amid delivery miss as Gene Munster thinks delivery figures represent positive shifts for Elon Musk.

headline: Rivian defies expectations despite rough EV environment
summary: Much of the recent good news about Rivian has only been tangentially accretive to the luxury EV maker's bottom line, but on Thursday, April 2, Rivian gave investors the best news they could hope for. The company reported delivering more vehicles between January and March than analysts had expected. ...

headline: Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) Target Raised at Truist Following Q4 Performance and Sector Review
